scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace packages/shared-types && npm run --workspace apps/api prisma:generate && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace packages/shared-types && npm run --workspace apps/api prisma:generate && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared-types && npm run --workspace apps/api prisma:generate && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
